prompt: O Brasil estava entre os países com maior número total de doses de vacina contra COVID-19 aplicadas no mundo?

citations.title: Coronavirus (COVID-19) Vaccinations - Our World in Data
Brazil Coronavirus COVID-19 Vaccination Total - Trading Economics
COVID-19 vaccines | WHO COVID-19 dashboard - WHO Data
COVID-19 Data Explorer - Our World in Data

response:
I'll check if Brazil is among the countries with the highest total COVID-19 vaccine doses administered worldwide.

BanayBased on the search results, Brazil was indeed among the countries with the highest total number of COVID-19 vaccine doses administered globally. Here's a summary of the key evidence:

1. **Total Doses Administered**: As of October 2023, Brazil had administered over **486 million COVID-19 vaccine doses** ([Trading Economics](https://tradingeconomics.com/brazil/coronavirus-vaccination-total)).

2. **Global Ranking**: 
   - Brazil consistently ranked **5th among Latin American countries** for COVID-19 vaccination doses per 100 population ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1288019/population-vaccinated-against-covid-brazil/)).
   - In global comparisons (Our World in Data), Brazil appeared alongside countries like the US, Argentina, Chile, and Peru in cumulative vaccination metrics, indicating its position among top vaccinating nations.

3. **Vaccination Coverage**:
   - Approximately **88% of Brazil's population** received at least one vaccine dose
   - About **82% were fully vaccinated** with the recommended regimen ([Statista](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1288019/population-vaccinated-against-covid-brazil/)).

While the exact global ranking position isn't specified in these sources, the scale of Brazil's vaccination campaign (nearly half a billion doses) and its consistent appearance in comparative datasets with major vaccinating nations confirm it was indeed among the top countries globally for total COVID-19 vaccine administration.
response_no_search:
Sim, **o Brasil esteve consistentemente entre os países com o maior número absoluto de doses de vacinas contra COVID-19 aplicadas no mundo**, ocupando geralmente a **4ª ou 5ª posição** no ranking global durante o auge da campanha de vacinação (2021-2022).
